fileManifest.app/globals.css: Complete design system — CSS variables for dark/light mode (--background, --surface, --surface-raised, --surface-overlay, --border, --border-strong, --text-primary, --text-secondary, --text-tertiary, --accent, --accent-hover, --accent-glow, --success, --warning, --error, --radius-sm/md/lg/xl), glass-card/glass-card-hover/glass-card-active classes, btn-primary/btn-secondary/btn-ghost/btn-danger button classes, input-field class, badge classes (badge-default/accent/success/warning/error), skeleton loading classes with shimmer animation, modal-overlay/modal-card classes, animation classes (animate-fade-in/slide-in/scale-in), divider class, light mode overrides via .light class
fileManifest.app/layout.tsx: Root layout — ClerkProvider with afterSignOutUrl, Inter font via next/font, dark class on html element, Sonner Toaster (richColors, bottom-right), metadata from NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME env var. Does NOT render Header — Header lives in app/dashboard/layout.tsx.
fileManifest.app/dashboard/layout.tsx: Dashboard layout — default: Header (column) + main content. For SIDEBAR apps: modified by nav ticket to Header (top) + flex-row of Sidebar + main. For TOP_NAV apps: unchanged (nav links added inside header.tsx instead). ALL authenticated pages must live under app/dashboard/.
fileManifest.components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: Sidebar nav component (Client Component) — ONLY for NAV_DECISION: SIDEBAR apps. Accepts navItems prop ({label, href, icon}[]). Renders nav links with active state via usePathname. Position: sticky top:60px (below header), height: calc(100vh-60px). Uses var(--surface) + var(--border) CSS variables. NEVER modify this component directly — configure only via navItems prop in app/dashboard/layout.tsx. Header still renders at top for sidebar apps.
fileManifest.app/dashboard/billing/page.tsx: Billing page — only exists in apps with Stripe subscription billing. Shows current plan name, status, and next billing date. Has a 'Manage Billing' button that POSTs to /api/billing/portal to open the Stripe Billing Portal. Accessible via the Billing link in the UserButton dropdown menu in components/header.tsx.
fileManifest.app/page.tsx: Public landing page — full marketing page with its own custom nav (logo + Sign in + Get started links). Does NOT use components/header.tsx. Has Hero, Features, How it works, Pricing (if app has Stripe), and Footer CTA sections.
fileManifest.app/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx: Clerk catch-all sign-in page with dark theme appearance config
fileManifest.app/sign-up/[[...sign-up]]/page.tsx: Clerk catch-all sign-up page with dark theme appearance config
fileManifest.components/header.tsx: Sticky glass header (Client Component) — rendered automatically by app/dashboard/layout.tsx for all authenticated dashboard pages. Left: app name from NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME, right: ThemeToggle button + Clerk UserButton (signed in) or sign-in link (signed out). ALREADY HANDLES: user avatar, email display (via UserButton dropdown), and sign-out. NEVER import or render this component directly inside any page.tsx file — app/dashboard/layout.tsx already renders it. NEVER render it in app/page.tsx — the landing page has its own custom nav.
fileManifest.lib/supabase/client.ts: Supabase browser client using createBrowserClient from @supabase/ssr — for use in Client Components only
fileManifest.lib/supabase/server.ts: Supabase server client using createServerClient with async cookies() from next/headers — for Route Handlers and Server Components
fileManifest.middleware.ts: Clerk auth middleware using createRouteMatcher — protects all routes except /, /sign-in, /sign-up, /api/webhooks/*
fileManifest.next.config.js: Next.js config with remotePatterns for Clerk and Supabase image domains — CommonJS format, do not change to .ts
fileManifest.tailwind.config.ts: Tailwind config with CSS variable tokens for all colors, custom shadow-glass/shadow-glow utilities, custom border radius scale, fade-in/slide-up keyframe animations, darkMode: class
fileManifest.tsconfig.json: TypeScript config with strict: true, moduleResolution: bundler, @/* path alias resolving to project root
fileManifest.postcss.config.js: PostCSS config with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins
fileManifest..env.example: Template for all required environment variables — NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME, clerk routing URLs
fileManifest.neev-architecture.md: Authoritative design system and coding standards reference — tech stack versions, CSS variables, glass morphism patterns, component patterns, TypeScript standards, Clerk and Supabase integration guides
